TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Doug Bolstorff nalecuhan i American, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Doug Bolstorff i 1957 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 8 ku uwac atu silsil 57, namapili' tu nu Detroit Pistons putiput. 10 bulad 29 demiad, 1931 a mihca, Doug Bolstorff, miunduay.
S.PHON: doug bor~ɾstorff nar~ɾəʦuħan i aməriʦan, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. doug bor~ɾstorff i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu dətroit pistons putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, doug bor~ɾstorff, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Doug Bolstorff nalecuhan i American, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Doug Bolstorff i 1957 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 8 ku uwac atu silsil 57, namapili' tu nu Detroit Pistons putiput. 10 bulad 29 demiad, 1931 a mihca, Doug Bolstorff, miunduay.
S.PHON: doug bor~ɾstorff nar~ɾəʦuħan i aməriʦan, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. doug bor~ɾstorff i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu dətroit pistons putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, doug bor~ɾstorff, miunduaj.
